extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the Company’s “Against our Company” row—1 criminal proceeding and 4 tax proceedings—and excluded all “By our Company” matters (5 civil matters, ₹1,337.80 million) and promoter matters; statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company are Nil, and director/promoter against rows are Nil. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is ₹170.86 million; promoter personal matters of ₹3.03 million and all “By” matters are excluded, giving ₹17.086 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹230.47 million as at December 31, 2024, converted to ₹23.047 crore rather than re-summing line items. The only concentration percentages are for construction project receipts/top projects or business segments, not company-wide top-five/top-ten customers; therefore customer concentration fields are null. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10 (₹1 million = ₹0.1 crore).
